title: Jesuh’ Om Nading Mun Na Nei Hiam

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Na mawhna tang a thuak Jesuh,
Omna ding mun a om hiam?
Kong khak kiu-in lut ding hong
Mawh neite’n a ngai na diam?

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na lung sunggah na omsak leh,
Na mawhna tang ding si hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa Ejsuh in a hun ciang,

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Omna’ng mun le hun na pia in,
Sawt lo-in hong sam pakkha leh,
